title: Do Google engineers actually vibe code?
summary: Alberta Tech explores whether Google engineers use code generation tools ("vibe code") by comparing OpenAI Codex and Claude Code capabilities, examining current practices at Google in 2024, and speculating about future adoption trends through 2026.
